summary: BIC approves only a few dozen public wholesale market renewal applications each year, so its average approval-time figure can swing sharply from a small number of unusually fast or slow cases. Fiscal 2025's improvement to 103 days (44% faster than fiscal 2024) reflects processing gains BIC reported that year, while its more recent reporting shows renewal approval times rising again alongside a loss of application-review staff.

sources.label: Business Integrity Commission, Fiscal 2025 Mayor's Management Report

oneLiner: swinging year to year since BIC approves only a few dozen renewals annually
